classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, item description, and payment confirmation. The presence of these fields, along with the clear indication of payment completion, confirms that this is an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 schema fields, including clear evidence of payment completion, actual amounts charged, and a receipt of transaction. This meets the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Wir hoffen Sie hatten eine angenehme Fahrt

issues.description: The supplier name does not show the local employer company name as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer company name must appear on invoices

issues.description: The supplier address does not show the local employer address as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer address must appear on invoices

issues.description: The VAT number provided does not match the required format or value.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Local Employer VAT ID must appear on invoices

issues.description: The customer name is missing on the receipt, which is mandatory for travel-related expenses.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Worker name must appear on hotel/flight invoices

issues.description: Mileage reimbursement requires a record of kilometers traveled with an exact continuous logbook (Fahrtenbuch) and a map with the relevant route.
issues.recommendation: Please submit a record of kilometers traveled with an exact continuous logbook (Fahrtenbuch) and a map with the relevant route (Google Maps is sufficient)
issues.knowledge_base_reference: To claim mileage, a record of kilometers traveled must be submitted with exact continuous logbook (Fahrtenbuch). Worker will need to share a map with the relevant route (google maps is sufficient)

issues.description: Travel expenses must be submitted using the Travel Expense Report Template Austria EUR.xlsx.
issues.recommendation: Please submit the travel expenses using the Travel Expense Report Template Austria EUR.xlsx
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Travel expenses must be submitted using the Travel Expense Report Template Austria EUR.xlsx

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has multiple compliance issues including missing local employer information, incorrect VAT number, missing customer name, and insufficient documentation for mileage reimbursement. Additionally, the travel expense report template was not used as required.
